card.name: Kunoichi

abilities.name: Arcane Reservoir
abilities.text: Crews containing one or more models with this ability increase their maximum hand size by one.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Lookout
abilities.text: After an enemy model resolves an attack action that targeted an ally at a lower elevation and in this model's LoS, this model may drain a (soulstone) to place the ally within 6" of its current location.

actions.name: Hidden Shuriken
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is on a higher elevation than the target, this model may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: To the Rooftops
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target blocking terrain. Place this model within 4" of its current location on top of the chosen piece of terrain.

triggers.name: Clarity
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

extraction_notes: Cost shown as '-' indicating this is likely a Totem with no hiring cost

info: Extraction note: Cost shown as '-' indicating this is likely a Totem with no hiring cost
